title: Unicorn Colouring Sets for Kids Ages 4-8, Great Travel Colouring Kit Or Activity Sets for Kids Ages 3-5 with Erasable Doodle Book, Stickers, Scratch Paper, Washable Markers, Unicorn Gifts for Girls
features: Airplane Travel Essential Kids & Toddlers: Just like busy books for kids, this travel colouring kit for kids will keep your little girl engaged for hours, with less screen time. The convenient carry bag makes it perfect for airplane, car games and activities

Unicorns Gifts For Girls: Do you have a little girl in your life who LOVES unicorn stuff? Other popular themes included are mermaid and fairy. This is perfect girls' toys or birthday gifts for 6+ year old girls, and ages 4, 5, 7 and up.

Kids Art Set - Four arts and crafts activities in one set! Use the stencils to draw on the reusable activity pad or trace pictures through the transparent page; reusable stickers to create lovely pictures on the scenes or scratch paper. All markers in this art set for kids conform to ASTM D-4236.

Complete Unicorn Activity Set: This kids activity book is packed with extra features others don't have, including a personalized, reverse sequin front cover, plush back cover, reusable stickers scratch paper, removable pencil case and pom pom keychain. All markers in this art set for kids conform to ASTM D-4236.

What’s Included? - Aside from a lot of sparkle, a sprinkle of fluffiness and a bucketload of cuteness, this kids activity book includes 5 themed stencil sheets for drawing fantastic shapes, rainbow scratch paper for a colorful splash of imagination, 100 reusable stickers for story creation and 20 tracing images for practicing artistic skills. All markers in this art set for kids conform to ASTM D-4236.
